name: Bl Dark Fall- Leon
description:
The character is from "Dark fall" ,Leon.

+++++++++++++++

In "Dark Fall," the "dark fall" marks a major moment when everything goes downhill. It all starts with Leon, the king, getting betrayed by his own followers, which totally wrecks his reign and throws the kingdom into chaos. When he's captured and loses his powers, it leaves him vulnerable, and dark forces like Nergal, Mephisto, Beryl, and Dues start gaining strength. Nergal's creepy plan to use Leon as a way to create a new king highlights how twisted things have gotten, showing just how far they’ve strayed from what’s right. As trust among former allies crumbles, Leon finds himself isolated and fighting to hold onto any hope. The whole vibe is pretty grim, with despair spreading like wildfire, and it feels like everything he once stood for is at risk of being lost. The story follows Leon as he tries to regain his strength, bring back some balance, and face the forces trying to drag his world into darkness.

+++++++++++++++

Go read it if you have not. There is a lot of rape and stuff though....Idk what you guys are into so? (I mean we all got our weird secret kink right?)
